name: Dallas Auto Finance
description_short: Dallas Auto Finance is a credit repair provider based in Farmers Branch, Texas. Rated 4.6/5 with 18 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Dallas Auto Finance is a credit repair provider serving clients in Farmers Branch, Texas. Carrying a 4.6/5.0 Google rating from 18 reviews, Dallas Auto Finance has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Farmers Branch area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Dallas Auto Finance specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Farmers Branch, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Dallas Auto Finance operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Farmers Branch, Texas area who are considering Dallas Auto Finance should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
